package rulecoverage

func PositiveRsaKeySizeTooSmall() string {
    ruleID := "rsa_key_size_too_small"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`rsa.GenerateKey(rand, bits)` where `bits` is literally `< 2048`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
